summary: Verified all 3 new surfaces from iteration_2: (1) /qrcodes admin-gated route, (2) Ticketmaster placeholder deep links with UTMs, (3) analytics track() console wiring. All 11 acceptance criteria PASS. No bugs found, no regressions detected on home/admin/rewards.

qrcodes_gate.inherits_unlock_from_admin: PASS (verified via shared storage.getAdminUnlock + bsp.adminUnlock.v1 24h TTL in code)

qrcodes_dashboard.testids_per_card: PASS — poster-card-<id>, poster-preview-<id>, poster-download-png-<id>, poster-download-pdf-<id> all present
qrcodes_dashboard.png_download_triggered: PASS — clicking poster-download-png-city-hall-plaza triggered download 'bsp-poster-city-hall-plaza.png' with no JS exceptions

rewards_rw400_cta.claim_after_400pts: PASS — injected localStorage 'bsp.activity.v1' [{id, at:ISO, delta:400, label}] → balance shows 400 → claim button enabled → claim succeeded → confetti rendered

admin_tile_and_sidebar.admin_link_qrcodes_tile: PASS — testid 'admin-link-qrcodes' at top of /admin, href='/qrcodes'

analytics.console_events_seen: PASS — captured: app_open, route_view (/qrcodes, /), admin_unlock (surface:qrcodes), qr_poster_download (venueId:city-hall-plaza, format:png). 14 [analytics] lines total in dev mode.

mocked_integrations_confirmed: PostHog/Mixpanel — track() only console.logs in DEV (TODO marker in /app/frontend/src/lib/analytics.ts:2)
Admin BI figures (QR Scans, Active Users, etc.) are MOCKED — banner reads 'MOCK ANALYTICS · Mock data — wire to Mixpanel · PostHog · Firebase Analytics'
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Rewards.tsx throws 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading split)' if an Activity entry is missing the 'at' field. Not a real-world bug (the store always writes valid entries), but consider hardening parseISO(a.at) with a fallback. Discovered only because my initial test injection used wrong schema. Not blocking.
seed_data_creation: Injected 'bsp.activity.v1' = [{id, at:ISO, delta:400, label}] in localStorage to short-circuit point accumulation for rw-400 claim test (per request guidance).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new surfaces (/qrcodes Studio, Ticketmaster placeholder deep links, analytics wrapper) pass acceptance criteria 100%. When injecting test activity entries, use schema {id, at: ISO string, delta, label} — NOT {ts, kind, title} — otherwise Rewards.tsx crashes on parseISO(undefined).
rca_of_issue: No app bugs. One tester-side gotcha documented above.
